datasources.name: kubernetes_cluster_v2
datasources.description: Use this data source to get informationa about a VKCS Kubernetes cluster (V2 API).

string.description: The region in which to obtain the Container Infra client. If omitted, the `region` argument of the provider is used.

bool.description: Enable public IP for the cluster.

set.description: Addresses of registries from which you can download images without checking certificates.

map.description: Key-value pairs of labels for the cluster.

string.description: The UUID of the load balancer's subnet.

set.description: List of CIDR blocks allowed to access the load balancer.

string.description: The time at which cluster was created.

set_nested.description: The list of cluster node groups.

string.description: Flavor of nodes in node group.

int64.description: Number of nodes in node group.

datasources.name: kubernetes_node_group_v2
datasources.description: Use this data source to get information about a VKCS Kubernetes cluster's node group (V2 API).

string.description: Region to use for the node group. Default is a region configured for provider.
The ID of the node group.
The UUID of the node group.
Flavor ID of the nodes from node group.
The availability zone of the node group.
Type of scaling for the node group.

int64.description: The node count of the node group, if scale_type is 'fixed_scale'.
The node count of the node group, if scale_type is 'auto_scale'.
The minimum allowed nodes for this node group.
The maximum allowed nodes for this node group.

map.description: The list of key-value pairs representing additional properties of the node group.

set_nested.description: The list of objects representing node group taints.

int64.description: The maximum percent of nodes that can be unavailable during an upgrade.

string.description: The volume type to load nodes from.

int64.description: The size in GB for volume to load nodes from.

string.description: The time at which node group was created.

resources.name: kubernetes_cluster_v2
resources.description: Provides a kubernetes cluster resource v2. This can be used to create, modify and delete kubernetes clusters v2.

string.description: UUID of the cluster. If not provided, will be generated automatically.
Kubernetes version of the cluster. Changing this upgrades a cluster.

bool.description: Enable public IP for the cluster. If true, a floating IP will be assigned to the cluster. Default false.

string.description: The name of the cluster. Should match the pattern `^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_.-]*$`.
ID of the cluster's network. Cluster can be created only in network with SDN=sprut.

set.description: Availability zones of the cluster. Use 1 zone for standard cluster, 3 zones for regional cluster.

string.description: Type of the kubernetes cluster. Must be either 'standard' or 'regional'.

set.description: Addresses of registries from which you can download images without checking certificates.

map.description: Key-value pairs of labels for the cluster.

string.description: The UUID of the load balancer's subnet.

set.description: List of CIDR blocks allowed to access the load balancer.

int64.description: Number of master nodes. Use 1 for standard cluster, 3 or 5 for regional cluster. Changing this creates a new cluster.

string.description: Flavor UUID for master nodes. Changing this scales master nodes to the target flavor.
Contents of the kubeconfig file. Use it to authenticate to Kubernetes cluster.
The time at which cluster was created.
API LoadBalancer FIP (Floating IP). IP address field.
API LoadBalancer VIP (Virtual IP). IP address field.

set_nested.description: The list of cluster node groups.

string.description: Flavor of nodes in node group.

int64.description: Number of nodes in node group.

string.description: Region to use for the cluster. Default is a region configured for provider.

schema.description: Provides a cluster node group resource for V2 API. This can be used to create, modify and delete cluster's node group.

string.description: The ID of the node group.
The ID of the target cluster. Changing this will force to create a new node group.
The UUID of the node group. Generated automatically after node group creation.
The name of node group to create. Changing this will force to create a new node group.
Flavor ID of the nodes from node group.
The availability zone of the node group.

Type of scaling for the node group. Must be either 'fixed_scale' or 'auto_scale'. If scale_type is 'auto_scale', then the condition 'auto_scale_min_size <= auto_scale_node_count <= auto_scale_max_size' must be met.

int64.description: The desired node count of the node group. Required if scale_type is 'fixed_scale'.

When creating a cluster, this parameter allows to specify the desired initial number of nodes in the node group. During the cluster lifecycle, indicates the current number of nodes in the node group. Required if scale_type is 'auto_scale'.
The minimum allowed nodes for this node group. Required if scale_type is 'auto_scale'.
The maximum allowed nodes for this node group. Required if scale_type is 'auto_scale'.

map.description: The list of key-value pairs representing additional properties of the node group.

set_nested.description: The list of objects representing node group taints. Each object should have following attributes: key, value, effect.

string.description: Effect of the taint. Must be one of: 'NoSchedule', 'PreferNoSchedule', 'NoExecute'.

int64.description: The maximum percent of nodes that can be unavailable during an upgrade.

string.description: The root volume type to load nodes from.

int64.description: The size in GB for volume to load nodes from.

string.description: Region to use for the node group. Default is a region configured for provider.
The time at which node group was created.
